title: Vellai Pura Ondru Lyrics Puthu Kavithai
stanzas: <div>Vellai Pura Ondru Song Lyrics Puthu Kavithai

namadhu kadhai
pudhu kavithai.
ilakkanangal idharku illai.
naan undhan poo maalai

Gangai vellam paaayumpodhu
karaigal enna vaeliyo.
aaviyodu serndha jothi
paadhai maara koodumo

nee kondu vaa
kadhal varam.
oor thoovumey
panneer maram.

poovil serndhu vazhdha vaasam
kaaval thanai meerume.
kaalam maarum endra podhum
kadhla nadhi oorumey

vara araigalai maatrum podhu
thalaimuraigalum maarumey.
endrum undhan nenjoramey
aanbe undhan sanjaaramey.

namadhu kadhai
pudhu kavithai.
ilakkanangal idharku illai.
naan undhan poo maalai

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Vellai Pura Ondru?

The song conveys themes of love and longing, expressing deep emotional connections.

In which movie does Vellai Pura Ondru appear?

The song is featured in the movie Puthu Kavithai.

Who is the singer of Vellai Pura Ondru?

The song is sung by the renowned KJ Yesudas.

Who composed the music for Vellai Pura Ondru?

The music was composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja.

When was Vellai Pura Ondru released?

The song was released on June 11, 1982.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Vellai Pura Ondru, the lyrics beautifully express the emotions of love and longing, making it a quintessential romantic song. The melody, composed by Ilaiyaraaja, evokes a sense of nostalgia that resonates with listeners. This song captures the essence of heartfelt connections, making it perfect for intimate occasions like weddings and anniversaries. The soothing vocals of KJ Yesudas further enhance the emotional depth, creating a timeless classic that continues to touch hearts.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Vellai Pura Ondru is a timeless melody that captures the essence of love and nostalgia, beautifully rendered by the legendary KJ Yesudas. The enchanting composition by Ilaiyaraaja paired with Vairamuthu's evocative lyrics creates a magical atmosphere that resonates with listeners. Experience the heartfelt emotions of this classic from Puthu Kavithai and let it transport you to a world of romance.
stanzaMeanings: Where is the white flower that should come to my hand?
Our story is a new poem. There are no rules for this. I am your flower garland.
When the river flows, what will the waves do? Will the light that merges with the air change the path?
The color of love is seen in the eyes. Can the color of the face be seen?
You bring love as a gift. The tree that gives shade to the village.
Dreams that are burning do not fade away.
Where is the white flower that should come to my hand?
Living together in the flower, the fragrance will change. When time changes, the river will flow through the village.
Only the signs will change, but the main paths will remain. Your heart will always be there, and your words will always be there.
When the coolness of the sky is there, there will be some beauty.
Where is the white flower that should come to my hand?
Our story is a new poem. There are no rules for this. I am your flower garland.
